{{Infobox character
| name = Tomb Hydra
| species = Dreadgod
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|guardian, baby Dreadgod}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|honeycomb-like room}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

''See also: [[Tomb Hydra Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb]] Hydra is a formidable guardian creature located within a honeycomb-like spherical chamber filled with numerous tunnels. Described as having power comparable to a baby [[Dreadgod]], this entity is capable of striking fear even into a [[Sage]]. Physically, the creature possesses three heads with glowing green eyes and a massive body that can obscure surrounding passageways. It is capable of dropping from ceilings to attack and appears to reproduce or emerge from bulbous sacs within its fleshy environment. The creature's internal structure contains a parasitic [[madra]] system, and it can produce a [[binding]] that resembles a large, spectral green human heart. During combat, the Hydra may suffer severe injuries, such as losing multiple heads, though its remaining parts can still exhibit glowing veins of raw [[madra]].}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb]] Hydra is a powerful guardian described as a baby [[Dreadgod]] that possesses the strength to make even a [[Sage]] tremble with fear. This dreadbeast, which utilizes a parasitic [[madra]] system, was discovered within a honeycomb-like room where its blood coated much of the floor. During an examination of its [[binding]], it was observed that a [[Tomb]] Hydra emerged from a slick, bulbous sac located in the upper chamber. This [[binding]] is characterized by a beating and throbbing heart-shaped form.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra]] is a guardian described as a baby [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra]] is powerful enough to cause a [[Sage]] to tremble in fear.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra]] is a creature found in a honeycomb-like room.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra]] is a dreadbeast with a parasitic [[madra]] system.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra]]'s blood covered much of the floor.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra]] has a [[binding]] that [[Lindon]] is examining.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Tomb Hydra]] emerged from a slick bulbous sac in the upper chamber.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra]] has a beating, throbbing heart-shaped [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“It seems we're about to reach a guardian known as the Tomb Hydra, powerful enough to cause a Sage to tremble in fear, and likened to a Dreadgod.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgods]]
